text:
Part B entitlement may enroll in the plan 
benefit package. 
TYPE: 
CHAR 
LENGTH: 
1 
SOURCE: 
CMS (HPMS files) 
VALUES: 
1 = Part A/B (no waiver of Part A requirement) 
2 = Part B Only 
9 = Not Applicable 
COMMENT: 
The CCW constructs the plan characteristics file from information submitted by plan sponsors to 
CMS’s Health Plan Management System (HPMS).
